name: lark
description: Feishu/Lark channel plugin for Codex — receive messages via WebSocket, reply with text/images/files, manage cross-session memory

interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to Feishu/Lark through an MCP channel plugin. It receives bot messages over WebSocket, forwards them into Codex, and lets Codex reply with text, cards, images, files, reactions, local memory, and scheduled jobs.
defaultPrompt: Summarize what Lark remembers about me
